rich_ambient_collect_only.interpretation: Rich has a large pytest surface, but a clean task-admission runner must install project and dev dependencies before smoke tests.

rich_isolated_collect_only.interpretation: Rich collection is feasible in an isolated environment after installing the project plus pytest and attrs.

rich_task_admission_readiness.interpretation: Rich can continue into task admission, but primary runs remain unauthorized. W* needs Golden-Oracle construction and still falls short of the 40-candidate target under the stricter readiness scan.

rich_direct_smoke_pilot.interpretation: One Rich W* direct-oracle candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This is pilot evidence only and does not freeze a denominator.

rich_direct_smoke_batch.interpretation: All current Rich W* direct-oracle candidates were smoke-tested. Five passed admission smoke, but this remains far below the 20-primary denominator target and excludes source-only Golden-Oracle candidates.

rich_r_direct_smoke_batch.interpretation: All current Rich R direct-oracle candidates were smoke-tested. Eight passed admission smoke; R still needs Golden-Oracle construction for non-direct work before any full R denominator can be frozen.

rich_r_source_oracle_queue.interpretation: Rich R now has a redacted Golden-Oracle construction queue after the direct-smoke batch. It can reach the 20-primary and 25 primary-plus-reserve targets only if enough queued hidden verifiers are authored and pass no-op/reference admission smoke; no R denominator is frozen yet.

rich_r_source_oracle_pilot_split_lines.interpretation: One Rich R source-only Golden-Oracle candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raises accepted R tasks to 9, still below the 20-primary and 25 primary-plus-reserve targets.

rich_r_source_oracle_pilot_cache.interpretation: One Rich R source-only Golden-Oracle candidate using cells_cached_len_unicode_version passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raises accepted R tasks to 10, still below the 20-primary and 25 primary-plus-reserve targets.

rich_r_source_oracle_pilot_traceback.interpretation: One Rich R source-only Golden-Oracle candidate using traceback_locals_depth_overflow_options passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raises accepted R tasks to 11, still below the 20-primary and 25 primary-plus-reserve targets.

rich_r_source_oracle_pilot_progress.interpretation: One Rich R source-only Golden-Oracle candidate using progress_disabled_stop_no_blank_line passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raises accepted R tasks to 12, still below the 20-primary and 25 primary-plus-reserve targets.

rich_direct_smoke_batch_diagnostics.interpretation: Rejected direct candidates have actionable next steps: construct replacement Golden-Oracle verifiers for no-op-passing tests and prune/replace the timeout verifier.

rich_source_oracle_queue.interpretation: At queue time, Rich needed 15 of 18 queued verifier-construction items to pass no-op/reference admission to reach 20 W* primary tasks. Later pilots reached the 20-primary count, but the 20-primary plus 5-reserve target remains impossible under the current 23 W* design-candidate supply.

rich_source_oracle_pilot.interpretation: One Rich W* source-only Golden-Oracle candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raised admitted W* task count to 6 before the emoji pilot, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_source_oracle_pilot_emoji.interpretation: A second Rich W* source-only Golden-Oracle candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raised admitted W* task count to 7 before the link-ID pilot, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_source_oracle_pilot_linkids.interpretation: A third Rich W* source-only Golden-Oracle candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raised admitted W* task count to 8 before the replacement-oracle pilot, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_replacement_oracle_pilot.interpretation: One Rich W* rejected direct candidate passed replacement-oracle no-op/reference admission smoke. This raised admitted W* task count to 9 before the zero-width-span replacement pilot, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_replacement_oracle_pilot_zerospan.interpretation: A second Rich W* rejected direct candidate passed replacement-oracle no-op/reference admission smoke. This raised admitted W* task count to 10 before the VS16 replacement pilot, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_replacement_oracle_pilot_vs16.interpretation: A third Rich W* rejected direct candidate passed replacement-oracle no-op/reference admission smoke. This raised admitted W* task count to 11 before the direct-without-node Oracle pilot, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_direct_without_nodes_oracle_pilot.interpretation: One Rich W* direct-tests-without-extractable-nodes candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raises admitted W* task count to 12, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_source_oracle_pilot_drop38.interpretation: A fourth Rich W* source-only Golden-Oracle candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raises admitted W* task count to 13, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_source_oracle_pilot_svg_hash.interpretation: A fifth Rich W* source-only Golden-Oracle candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raises admitted W* task count to 14, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_source_oracle_pilot_currentframe.interpretation: A sixth Rich W* source-only Golden-Oracle candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raises admitted W* task count to 15, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_source_oracle_pilot_lazy_expandable.interpretation: A seventh Rich W* source-only Golden-Oracle candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raises admitted W* task count to 16, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_source_oracle_pilot_emoji_main.interpretation: An eighth Rich W* source-only Golden-Oracle candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raises admitted W* task count to 17, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_source_oracle_pilot_fix_docstring.interpretation: A ninth Rich W* source-only Golden-Oracle candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raises admitted W* task count to 18, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_source_oracle_pilot_spelling.interpretation: A tenth Rich W* source-only Golden-Oracle candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raises admitted W* task count to 19, still below the 20-primary denominator target.

rich_source_oracle_pilot_remove_comments.interpretation: An eleventh Rich W* source-only Golden-Oracle candidate passed no-op/reference admission smoke. This raises admitted W* task count to 20, reaching the primary W* task count but not the W* reserve target, C/R construction, denominator freeze, or primary-run authorization.

rich_wstar_reserve_feasibility.interpretation: Rich W* reached 20 accepted primary candidates but cannot reach the 25-task primary-plus-reserve target or 40-candidate pool under the current frozen W* scan.

rich_r_source_oracle_pilots_primary_batc.interpretation: Rich R reached 20 accepted primary candidates after 8 direct-smoke admissions and 12 source-only Golden-Oracle pilots. R reserve remains incomplete: 5 more accepted tasks are needed for 20 primary plus 5 reserve, and no denominator is frozen.

rich_r_source_oracle_pilots_reserve_batc.interpretation: Rich R reached 25 accepted candidates after 8 direct-smoke admissions and 17 source-only Golden-Oracle pilots, satisfying the 20-primary plus 5-reserve count. No full C/R/W* denominator is frozen because the W* reserve gate explicitly failed under the frozen scan and primary-run authorization remains incomplete.

rich_c_extended_task_admission_readiness.interpretation: Extending C earlier to 2025-04-14 reaches the 20-task calibration design-candidate floor without borrowing from R or W*. This is readiness evidence only; no C denominator is frozen.

rich_c_direct_smoke_batch.interpretation: Three extended-C direct candidates passed no-op/reference admission smoke. The remaining direct candidates need replacement hidden verifiers before they can be admitted.

rich_c_source_oracle_queue.interpretation: Rich C received a redacted Golden-Oracle construction queue after extended-C direct smoke. At queue time it could reach 20 calibration tasks only if all 17 queued C verifier-construction items passed admission smoke; subsequent C pilots admitted all 17 queued items.

rich_c_source_oracle_pilots_primary_batc.interpretation: All 13 queued Rich C source-only Golden-Oracle candidates passed no-op/reference admission smoke. Together with 3 direct-smoke admissions, C reached 16 accepted calibration candidates and still needed 4 queued non-source-only items.

rich_c_replacement_and_direct_without_no.interpretation: Rich C reached 20 accepted calibration candidates after 3 direct-smoke admissions, 13 source-only Golden-Oracle pilots, 3 replacement-oracle pilots, and 1 direct-without-node Oracle pilot. This satisfies the C 20-task calibration floor but does not create a 5-task C reserve, solve W* reserve supply, or authorize primary model runs.

rich_acut_intervention_readiness.interpretation: Rich now has A0-A5 intervention manifests for the 0514 line. The A3 playbook uses admitted C outcomes only as abstract calibration and does not include W* material, hidden verifiers, raw commits, raw subjects, or ACUT outputs.

rich_wstar_reserve_gate_decision.interpretation: The explicit W* reserve-gate decision keeps primary runs unauthorized. Rich W* reached the 20-task primary floor, but the frozen scan cannot reach the 25-task primary-plus-reserve target and remains 17 candidates short of the 40-candidate pool target.

checklist.requirement: Pivot main line to repository-local benchmark generation and tuning validation; NFL only bonus.
Freeze C/R/W* split at T0=2026-05-14, with W* fixed to 2026-02-14..2026-05-14 and no borrowing earlier work.
Task 1: repository admission for Click, Rich, Black with candidate counts, test feasibility, family diversity, dependency risk, and recommendation.
checklist.gap: Candidate supply, test-surface presence, family counts, recommendation, Rich collect-only feasibility, Rich task-readiness counts, direct-oracle W*, R, and C smoke outcomes, the W*, R, and C Golden-Oracle queues, eleven source-only W* Golden-Oracle admission pilots, seventeen source-only R Golden-Oracle admission pilots, and all queued C Oracle admission pilots are present. Rich C now has 20 accepted calibration candidates. Full denominator-scale per-task historical smoke and measured test runtime are not yet measured.

checklist.requirement: Task 2: construct Click C/R/W* task sets: C 20-40, R 40 candidates -> 20 primary + 5 reserve, W* 40 candidates -> 20 primary + 5 reserve, with no-op/reference/leakage/family/difficulty/digests.
checklist.gap: Click W* has only 14 task-design candidates in the frozen window, below the 20-task gate. Rich has 20 accepted W* primary candidates, but only 23 stricter W* design candidates, so the explicit W* reserve-gate decision fails the 5-task reserve target and 40-candidate pool target. Rich R has 25 accepted tasks: 8 direct-smoke and 17 source-only Golden-Oracle, satisfying the 20-primary plus 5-reserve count. Rich C has 20 accepted calibration tasks: 3 direct-smoke, 13 source-only Golden-Oracle, 3 replacement-oracle, and 1 direct-without-node Oracle. The final blocked report records that no full C/R/W* denominator or primary run is permitted under the frozen 0514 gate.

checklist.requirement: Task 3: Codex role isolation for Golden-Selector, Golden-Taskwright, Golden-Oracle, Golden-Auditor with prompt hashes, artifact digests, and admission decisions.
checklist.gap: Roles and required artifacts are specified, but no 0514 role-run outputs or prompt hashes were generated for task admission.

checklist.requirement: Task 4: ACUT/intervention manifest for A0-A5, including A4 public-statement + repo source localization only.
checklist.gap: Rich A0-A5 intervention manifests now exist, including A1 inert, A2 static Rich context, A3 C-derived playbook, A4 public-statement/source-only localization, and generic A0/A5 references. No primary attempts were authorized or run.

checklist.requirement: Task 5: run R and W* with one primary attempt per ACUT/task, no best-of-N, fixed denominator, workspace fresh replay, hidden verifier, frozen status mapping.
checklist.gap: No primary attempts were authorized or run because the explicit W* reserve-gate decision blocks primary execution under the frozen 0514 protocol.

checklist.requirement: Task 6: analyze R_score, W*_score, paired deltas, inert control, R-selected, W*-best, selection regret, R/W* rank correlation, family effects, and R_barcarolle vs random-R if possible.
checklist.gap: No primary result table exists because primary runs were not authorized.

Rich C has 20 accepted calibration candidates, Rich W* has 20 accepted primary candidates, and Rich R has 25 accepted candidates after 8 direct-smoke acceptances and 17 source-only Golden-Oracle pilots. The final validity conclusion is blocked because the explicit W* reserve-gate decision prevents the frozen 0514 primary run.
No primary attempts were run or authorized.
R -> W* decision validity cannot be assessed without primary results.
The terminal threat is supply/gate failure before primary execution; full run-level threats are not applicable without primary runs.

checklist.requirement: Do not use W* results to modify R; do not use ACUT outputs to choose W*; do not mix old M5/M6 denominator; do not lower gates post hoc; do not overclaim W* freshness.
checklist.gap: No primary results exist. The final blocked report verifies that W* results, ACUT outputs, old denominators, post-hoc gate lowering, and W* freshness overclaims were not used for the actions taken.

next_required_step: No further primary-run or analysis work is authorized inside the frozen 0514 protocol. Future work requires a new owner decision: preregister a protocol revision, find additional eligible W* candidates inside the frozen window, or treat the blocked report as the terminal result.
